text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since we began training in earnest, and the
date of Sky's debut race has finally been decided.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Woo hoo! At last—the Twinkle Series! Even I'm getting a bit excited. Let's keep up the hard work!
choice_data_list: Jokes aside, let's come up with a plan.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha. I see you've gotten used to handling me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I get your point. After all, the key to a good fishing trip is
preparing quality bait. On that note... let's go for a walk!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup. A good idea isn't just gonna pop into your head by racking it for
answers, is it? Instead, why don't we go bask beneath the warm sun?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? Maybe we'll hear some useful info, or get some
unexpected inspiration along the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Sky and I begin aimlessly strolling around campus.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
K-King, check out the program for my next race! It has the running
styles of all my competitors listed on it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Is this the latest in precognitive technology?! The city sure is
amaz'n!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Um, that's not quite right. That document only shows predictions
based on information from previous races they've entered.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! I-I had no idea!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The race program, huh? Forgot about that. Based on my previous
races, I'll bet "front-runner" is listed next to my name.
choice_data_list: Yeah. That gives me an idea...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Trainer, that's your scheming face, isn't it? Did you come up with
something just now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We're doing scrimmages every day?! Against the opponents in my
debut race?! And you want me to run in them as a late surger instead
of a front-runner?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold up a second! The odds of that working are about as good
as me showing up to practice on time!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What. Did. You. Say?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is horrible! This is tyranny! I can't race under these conditions! I'll
lose my motivation long before I even finish!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. Hm, you're up to something, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Fiiine, not like I have a choice! You win, okay? I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: In exchange... you'll make sure I reel it in, won't you?

Sky spends the next few days scrimmaging against the opponents of
her upcoming debut race.

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm surprised, Sky. Are you really going to race as a late surger?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'm starting to think it's not so bad? I mean, it feels
kinda cool bursting into the lead during the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're not wrong... But you haven't been able to steal the lead even
once, you know? You keep running out of stamina.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And therein lies the rub. That's my homework. As you can see, my
stamina isn't anything worth writing home about... Hehe.

Slowly but surely, a certain rumor begins spreading around the
academy.

"Seiun Sky is going to race as a late surger, but her stamina is her
biggest weakness."

With even the race program now listing her as a late surger, the day
of her debut race finally arrives!
Bang!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the runners are out of the gate, each of them up-and-coming
runners vying for glory in their debut race! Leading in first is...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
S-Seiun Sky! It's Seiun Sky with the lead! She's running at full throttle,
leaving second far behind in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is front-running?! Wasn't she supposed to be a late surger?!
Did the debut race nerves get to her?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
A desperate dash... Par for the course for a rookie. Guess that's one
less competitor to watch for. It seems the other racers have come to
the same conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Sky's biggest weakness is her lack of stamina. There's no way
she can keep this pace through to the end.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's what you'd think, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All my stamina training was actually so I could keep up this
"desperate dash."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And then... before I knew it, this became my normal front-running
pace.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers have rounded the third corner! Seiun Sky is showing no
signs of slowing down!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Trainers
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Haha, that's what I like to hear!)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
(The body you're born with decides everything? Your talents? Your
pedigree? Nah, that's all so boring.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Races are fun because none of that matters!)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... You all took the bait! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is flying down the final stretch! This is textbook
front-running! What an upset! With a five-length lead, this race is
finished!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, did you hear that, Trainer? Instead of commotion, there's
confusion! Instead of cheers, there are shrieks! I can't get enough of
this! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Now this is how a race ought to be. You get it, and I respect that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, what's our next big catch? With you by my side, winning 'em all
might not be a pipe dream anym—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Stooooop right there! I won't let that happen!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! King and Spe... You both came to watch?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup, we saw everything! Congrats on first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're really amazing. But I'm not gonna lose to you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Next time, you will have a first-rate opponent—me! l shall
give you the right to suffer utter defeat at my hands.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm... That sounds like a real chore.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But, well... the larger the catch, the more reason to reel it in.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?

And so, I embark with Seiun Sky on a voyage across the vast sea of
racing, searching for our next big catch.
